title: Chain 1/8: Sign Up for Membership
scene: 你第一次去 Costco，在入口办会员。（对话链：仓储超市）

turns.en: Do you have a membership card?
No. I'd like to sign up.

turns.cn: 普通会员六十一年，高级一百二含返现。
turns.en: Standard is sixty a year. Executive is a hundred twenty with cashback.

turns.cn: 普通版就行，今天能用吗？
turns.en: Standard is fine. Can I shop today?
Yes, as soon as you pay.
Can I bring a guest?

turns.cn: 可以，但结账要用您的卡。
turns.en: Yes, but checkout must be on your card.

title: Chain 2/8: Get a Cart
scene: 你进去发现需要大推车，问员工在哪。（对话链：仓储超市）

turns.cn: 大推车在哪？入口好像没了。
turns.en: Where are the big carts? The entrance looks empty.

turns.cn: 刚用完，等两分钟推一批来。
turns.en: They just ran out. Another batch in two minutes.
Any flat carts? I'm getting bulky items.
By the appliances section inside.
Thanks.

title: Chain 3/8: Food Samples
scene: 你在仓储超市试吃样品。（对话链：仓储超市）

turns.en: Want to try our new energy bars?
Sure. Do they contain nuts?
Yes, almonds. Here's the ingredient list.
Then I can't. My family has allergies.

turns.cn: 理解，那边有无坚果的饼干试吃。
turns.en: Got it. There are nut-free cookies sampling over there.
Thanks for letting me know.

title: Chain 4/8: Bulk Household Items
scene: 你在买大包装日用品，向员工问路。（对话链：仓储超市）

turns.en: Where's the bulk laundry detergent?

turns.cn: 日用品区，过道十二尽头。
turns.en: Household aisle twelve, at the back.
Is toilet paper on sale?

turns.cn: 三十卷装减五块，本周有效。
turns.en: The thirty-roll pack is five off this week.

turns.cn: 好，推车放不下了怎么办？
turns.en: Okay. What if my cart is full?

turns.cn: 可以开双车，或结账后放车里再逛。
turns.en: You can take two carts, or check out and keep shopping.

title: Chain 5/8: Electronics Section
scene: 你看中一台电视，问保修政策。（对话链：仓储超市）

turns.en: How many years of warranty on this TV?

turns.cn: 厂家一年，店里延保另买。
turns.en: One year from the maker. Store extended warranty costs extra.
Do you deliver? Walk-up apartment.
Fifty extra for two-person carry upstairs.
Okay. I'll think about it.

title: Chain 6/8: Checkout Line
scene: 结账队伍很长，你和旁边顾客聊天。（对话链：仓储超市）

turns.en: Busy weekend. Do you come here often?
First time. The portions are huge.

turns.cn: 和家庭分着买划算，别一个人囤。
turns.en: Split with family. Don't stockpile alone.

turns.cn: 有道理，我可能就买太多了。
turns.en: Good tip. I probably overdid it.
As long as it fits in the freezer.

title: Chain 7/8: Gas Station
scene: 你在 Costco 加油站加油。（对话链：仓储超市）

turns.cn: 这队挺长的，但比外面便宜不少。
turns.en: Long line, but it's way cheaper than outside.

turns.cn: 是啊，必须刷会员卡对吧？
turns.en: Yeah. You need your membership card, right?
Right. Swipe first, then pump.
How much do you usually fill up?

turns.cn: 加满，这边每加仑能省二三十美分。
turns.en: I fill up. You save twenty or thirty cents a gallon here.
My turn. Thanks for the tip.

title: Chain 8/8: Load the Car
scene: 你把大包装商品装进后备箱，室友来帮忙。（对话链：仓储超市）

turns.cn: 买这么多，冰箱塞得下吗？
turns.en: That's a lot. Will the fridge fit it all?

turns.cn: 厕纸放储物间，吃的分你一半。
turns.en: Toilet paper in storage. I'll split the food with you.

turns.cn: 行，下次带我，我也想办会员。
turns.en: Deal. Take me next time. I want a membership too.
Sure. You can get a household card.
Perfect.
